name: Father
message: Thank you for your wisdom, guidance, and unconditional love.

name: Mother
message: Your warmth and care have shaped who we are today.

name: Brother
message: For all the laughs, support, and being our biggest cheerleader.

name: Sister
message: A sister, a friend, and our confidante through everything.

name: Best Friend
message: For standing by us through every chapter of our story.

name: Uncle
message: Your blessings and encouragement mean the world to us.
